label: Reconciliation
description: Reconciliation runs with break count, resolution status, break value, and drill-down per run.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file ✓.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().reconRuns — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: reconRuns is org-level audit history — no per-scope filter appropriate for recon summary.

1.7.note: MOCK_RECON_RUNS fixture in lib/mocks/fixtures/recon-runs — accessed via context (not widget) ✓.

l1.notes: 1.1/1.2/1.7 pass. 1.3–1.6 N/A — recon runs are org-level audit data, not per-strategy.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (recon runs are historical — same display in all modes) / paper ✓.

3.3.note: No order entry or submission in recon widget.

3.4.note: Human: confirm batch indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same display as live — recon history is read-only.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timer. MOCK_RECON_RUNS is static fixture.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A. Human needed for 3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers — read-only recon table ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify date, status badge, break count, break value columns legible.

4.4.note: Human: confirm recon runs render with correct status badges.

4.8.note: Human: verify scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target: all post-trade reconciliation workflows. Shows breaks, resolution status, and break value per recon run date. Applicable to any asset class or strategy — org-level audit view.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering loading/error/empty states, toolbar 'Recon summary (mock)' badge, column headers, Clean badge for zero-break runs, partial resolved badge, and date column. See tests/widgets/markets/markets-recon.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] x3 (lines 19/30/63) in table cells and badge. HFT density pattern — no Tailwind token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget (shared), Badge, AlertTriangle from components/ui/* ✓.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
. Read-only table ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify layout at minW=4, minH=3.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Org-level audit view — distinct purpose from order flow, book, or my-orders widgets.

relationships.notes: No cross-widget coupling. Standalone recon summary. Data from MOCK_RECON_RUNS static fixture via context.

dataContract.notes: Mock: MOCK_RECON_RUNS static fixture via MarketsDataContext. Production: REST endpoint for recon run history (batch cadence — recon runs daily/intraday).

gaps: No drill-down per break yet — break details panel pending
coverage.notes: Org-level recon summary. All asset classes and strategies. Break detail drill-down not yet implemented.

knownIssues: Widget header badge reads 'Recon summary (mock)' — intentional, to be removed when context upgrades to real API.

findings.description: markets-recon-widget.tsx — ~6 user-visible strings (Date, Status, Breaks, Break Value, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-recon-widget.tsx:19,30,63 — text-[10px] in table cells and badge
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro at lines 19 (Date cell), 30 (Status badge), and 63 (recon summary badge).
